name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected

labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Firefox 128]
- Deployment: [e.g. Podman on AlmaLinux 9]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]

## Screenshots
If applicable, paste screenshots here.
